controller.Win32-Window.label: PC-Default
controller.Win32-Window.description: Best compatibility, suitable for everyday use. Supports game minimization, may occasionally grab the mouse.
controller.Win32-Window-Background.label: PC-Background
controller.Win32-Window-Background.descr: Pure background controller. Supports game minimization and does not grab the mouse. However, it may cause the game window to move around erratically; this does not affect usage. It is recommended to minimize the game to avoid distraction.
controller.Win32-Front.label: PC-Foreground
controller.Win32-Front.description: Foreground control. Requires the game window to remain in the foreground and unobstructed; will fully grab the mouse.
controller.ADB.label: Android
controller.ADB.description: Supports Android emulators and physical Android devices.

task.AutoBIOSSetting.Description: If enabled, the difficulty will be automatically set to 25 before battle (skip if already set). If disabled, the battle will be fought at the difficulty selected last time before battle.
